title: S100A8/A9 high-expression macrophages mediate renal tubular epithelial cell damage in acute kidney injury following acute type A aortic dissection surgery.
abstract:
S100A8/A9 high-expression macrophages mediate renal tubular epithelial cell 
damage in acute kidney injury following acute type A aortic dissection surgery.
